title: Paraguay star Julio Enciso injured one week before USMNT World Cup clash - Yahoo Sports
original_text:
Paraguay star Julio Enciso injured one week before USMNT World Cup clash
Paraguay winger Julio Enciso was stretchered off in tears during Friday's friendly against Nicaragua, sparking fears over his status with just a week until the World Cup begins.
Enciso is one of the most crucial players for Paraguay, which kicks off the 2026 World Cup on June 12 against the U.S. men's national team in Los Angeles.
Advertisement
Paraguay won Friday's match 4-0 in Asunción, but the win was marred by an injury to Enciso that appeared to be serious.
In the 24th minute of Friday's match, Enciso awkwardly pulled up when attempting to collect a pass. He limped off before collapsing to the turf. The home crowd was silent as the 22-year old was removed on a stretcher.
GENERA PREOCUPACIÓN
😰A los 24 minutos del partido contra Nicaragua, Julio César Enciso se retiró lesionado y llorando, dejando al Defensores del Chaco en silencio.

— Tigo Sports (@TigoSportsPY) June 6, 2026
Returning to the World Cup for the first time since 2010, Paraguay was drawn into Group D along with the USMNT, Australia and Turkey.
On a team that isn't known for scoring many goals, Enciso is a vital creative spark in the attack. The winger has 32 caps for Paraguay, scoring four goals.
1 / 19
2026 World Cup: 20 players who will get you out of your seat
SPAIN: Lamine Yamal. Still just a teenager, few players are as exciting with the ball at their feet as the 18-year-old Barcelona winger. He already has 23 caps for Spain, bursting onto the scene as 16-year-old sensation.
(NIKOLAY DOYCHINOV, AFP via Getty Images)
2 / 19
2026 World Cup: 20 players who will get you out of your seat
ARGENTINA: Lionel Messi. This certainly is the last ride for the one of the greatest players to ever do it. He led La Albiceleste to World Cup glory in 2022 and is still defying Father Time at 38 years old (he'll turn 39 during the tournament).
(LUIS ROBAYO, AFP via Getty Images)
19 / 19
2026 World Cup: 20 players who will get you out of your seat
SENEGAL: Ismaila Sarr. The 27-year-old winger has scored four goals in seven matches for the national team in 2025 and is a key part to the overachieving Crystal Palace team in England.
(KENZO TRIBOUILLARD, AFP via Getty Images)
At the club level, Enciso just completed his first season in France with Strasbourg, tallying 12 goals in all competitions. Previously, he spent three seasons in the Premier League with Brighton and Ipswich.
